case_title: MICHAEL FEHR ET AL VS. FUGAZI TRAVEL AGENCY INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FUGAZI TRAVEL AGENCY INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FEHR, MICHAEL FEHR, MARY ANN AS TO DEFENDANT FUGAZI TRAVEL AGENCY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED FEB-15-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FUGAZI TRAVEL AGENCY INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FEHR, MICHAEL FEHR, MARY ANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUGAZI TRAVEL AGENCY INC. $1,236.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,351.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY FEHR, MICHAEL FEHR, MARY ANN FUGAZI TRAVEL AGENCY INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-05-2018 BY PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL FEHR IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MARY ANN FEHR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FUGAZI TRAVEL AGENCY INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GEORGE LIPPI, PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT FUGAZI TRAVEL AGENCY INC.
